PTD_SGMT_ID_12 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: Null/missing or a three-digit numeric value that includes leading zeros. 

COMMENT: If the beneficiary did not have a Part D plan for a given month, this variable will have null/missing 
value for that month. A beneficiary with a verified or unverified date of death will
